Veselin Veselinov Basketball Career

Add Outlook Add missing info
Born: Feb.16, 1983 in Sofia (Bulgaria)

Player: 202-F:
1998-1999: Slavia Sofia
1999: Adidas Summer Camp in Germany
1999-2000: Buba Basket Sofia (1T)
2000-2001: Buba Basket Sofia (1T)
2001-2002: Levski Sofia (1T)
2003-2004: Casper CC (JUCO)
2004-2005: W.Virginia St. (NCAA2)
2006-2007: BC Levski Ekopetroulium Sofia (A1, starting five): 35 games: 10.8ppg, 4.3rpg, 1.3apg, 1.3spg, 2FGP: 49.0%, 3PT: 27.7%, FT: 71.6%
2007-2008: BC Levski Ekopetroulium Sofia (A1, starting five): 43 games: 11.0ppg, 4.5rpg, 1.6apg, 1.3spg, FGP: 60.1%, 3PT: 27.9%, FT: 71.3%
2008-2009: PBC Lukoil Akademik Sofia (NBL): 19 games: 6.3ppg, 2.6rpg, FGP-3(65.4%), 3PT: 45.5%, FT: 87.5%: Eurocup: 6 games: 4.7ppg, 3.8rpg, 1.3apg
2009-2010: PBC Lukoil Akademik Sofia (NBL): 36 games: 5.9ppg, 2.3rpg, FGP: 58.5%, 3PT: 41.4%, FT: 73.8%
2010-2011: Lukoil Academic Sofia (NBL): 35 games: 5.1ppg, 2.6rpg, FGP: 54.3%, 3PT: 36.2%, FT: 55.6%: Eurocup Qualifying Round: 2 games: 1.5ppg, 1.0rpg; EuroChallenge: 14 games: 3.1ppg, 2.8rpg
2011-2012: Lukoil Academic Sofia (NBL): 30 games: 5.5ppg, 3.0rpg, FGP: 59.5%, 3PT: 38.5%, FT: 47.8%: Eurocup: 6 games: 0.7ppg
2012-2013: Lukoil Academic Sofia (NBL): 38 games: 9.8ppg, 3.7rpg, 1.0spg, FGP: 59.4%, 3PT-1(46.7%), FT: 75.4%; Eurocup: 6 games: 2.5ppg, 2.2rpg
2013-2014: Lukoil Academic Sofia (NBL): 29 games: 6.9ppg, 4.0rpg, 1.2apg, 1.2spg, FGP: 59.5%, 3PT: 41.4%, FT: 80.0%: Eurocup: 3 games: 4.7ppg, 3.0rpg, 1.3apg, 1.0spg
2014-2015: Lukoil Academic Sofia (NBL): 34 games: 6.7ppg, 2.9rpg, FGP: 58.6%, 3PT: 45.8%, FT: 65.0%; EuroChallenge: 6 games: 6.5ppg, 3.0rpg, FGP: 63.2%, 3PT: 25.0%, FT: 75.0%
2015-2016: Rilski Sportist Samokov (NBL): 14 games: 6.7ppg, 3.8rpg, 2FGP: 40.6%, 3FGP: 26.3%, FT: 63.2%; FIBA Europe Cup: 6 games: 7.7ppg, 2.0rpg, 1.5apg, 2FGP: 60.0%, 3FGP: 43.8%, FT: 53.8%, in Jan.'16 moved to BC Timisoara (Romania-Liga Nationala, starting five): 17 games: 8.8ppg, 5.2rpg, 1.2apg, FGP: 40.2%, 3PT: 34.3%, FT: 56.0%
2016-2017: Lukoil Academic Sofia (Bulgaria-NBL): Basketball Champions League: 2 games: 1.0ppg, 2.0rpg, in Oct.'16 moved to Swiss Central Basket Luzern (Switzerland-LNA, starting five): 12 games: 15.5ppg, 7.2rpg, 2.2apg, 1.5spg, 2FGP: 47.6%, 3FGP: 37.7%, FT: 71.8%, in Jan.'17 signed at BC Levski 2014 Sofia (NBL): 11 games: 15.7ppg, 6.0rpg, 2.4apg, 1.5spg, FGP: 52.2%, 3PT: 35.1%, FT: 67.9%
2017-2018: BC Levski 2014 Sofia (NBL): 25 games: 6.5ppg, 2.4rpg, FGP: 47.8%, 3PT: 39.7%, FT-3(87.9%)
2020-2021: Hebar Pazardzhik (Division A, starting five): 25 games: 15.3ppg, 6.0rpg, 3.2apg, 1.5spg, FGP: 51.7%, 3PT: 41.7%, FT: 81.0%
2021-2022: Hebar Pazardzhik (BBL Division A): 16 games: 11.6ppg, 3.9rpg, 1.6apg, FGP: 55.1%, 3PT: 33.3%, FT: 77.1%
2022-2023: Pravets (BBL Division A): 3 games: 3.3ppg
2023: Retired
